name: search
description: Web-search providers + orchestrator + /v1/search/* routes. Walks tavily/exa/google_cse/bing/brave in priority order, then falls through to playwright_mcp / web_mcp / free DDG-Brave fallback. Reads bridge/search-config.json + bridge/search-usage.json (user state files kept outside the module during migration). Disabling the module 404s /v1/search/* but the bridge `WebSearch` tool path in tools/exec.ts also imports the orchestrator — disabling does NOT silence that tool today.
